description: CompositionBlack leggings made of 94% viscose and 6% elastane, with scrunched up side hems towards the bottom and velvet ribbon bow detailingFittingRegularWash care Cold hand wash separately or delicated cold machine wash in garment bag Wash with similar colours Wash garment inside out Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Line dry in shade Cool iron on reverse side Dry cleanable Take feminine dressing to the next level in these black leggings from forever new. The soft fabric and velvet bow detailing on the sides towards the bottom lends it a girly feel. Team this with a white sleeveless tunic  top and ballerina flats for a stylishly chic look.Model statisticsHeight-5'8”, Waist - 26”, Hips – 36”
